calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. John P. Zanghi, Esq. stated to the Court that the case settled out of court. Trial date is vacated.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Advanced From Dec-02-02 To Nov-18-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT C. MORGAN RICHARDS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: John P. Zanghi, Esq. 241-1166 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court overruled the demurrer, 5 days to answer. Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
